calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 -
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:35am and concluding at 9:48am.

Plaintiff Amur Equipment Finance, Inc was present represented by Christina Mintz via zoom.
Defendants Hesti International Group, Inc. and Douglas Ken Tse not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff KARLA BERAN Head of Legal Department for Amur Equipment Finance, Inc who appeared via zoom and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Amur Equipment Finance, Inc., and against Defendant Hesti International Group, Inc. and Douglas Ken Tse, as follows:

Damages: $76,625.12
Prejudgment Interest: $14,469.93
Attorney Fees: $3,900.00
Costs: $757.52

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $95,752.57

Plaintiff is also entitled to possession fo the Kaeser Model SFC30 variable speed compressor.

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Continued To Jan-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Continued To Dec-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Attorney for Plaintiff Christina Minz appeared via zoom.
Defendant Hesti International Group not appearing.

The court informs counsel that not courtesy copies were supplied to this department prior to the hearing.

Thia matter is continued to December 19, 2025 at 9:00am to allow counsel to satisfy local rule 2.7.b.3 regarding paper courtesy copies.
